lines.name: Demigod's Dominance
lines.flavourText: #13 Berserker in the Perandus Flashback Event

lines.name: Demigod's Beacon

explicitModifiers.text: Adds 10 to 20 Fire Damage to Attacks

lines.flavourText: The light of victory burns eternally.

lines.name: Foulborn The Squire

explicitModifiers.text: Socketed Support Gems can also Support Skills from your Main Hand

mutatedModifiers.text: +1 to Level of Socketed Gems
Ignore Attribute Requirements of Socketed Gems

lines.flavourText:
Judge not the weak, for
they empower the strong.

lines.name: Foulborn The Squire

explicitModifiers.text: Socketed Support Gems can also Support Skills from your Main Hand

mutatedModifiers.text: +1 to Level of Socketed Gems

lines.flavourText:
Judge not the weak, for
they empower the strong.

lines.name: Foulborn Gruthkul's Pelt

mutatedModifiers.text: 100% increased Attack Damage
Your Warcries are disabled

lines.flavourText: Simple is the life of the bear.

lines.name: Foulborn Gruthkul's Pelt

mutatedModifiers.text: 100% increased Attack Damage
Your Warcries are disabled

lines.flavourText: Simple is the life of the bear.

lines.name: Foulborn Rathpith Globe

explicitModifiers.text: Sacrifice 10% of your Life when you Use or Trigger a Spell Skill
5% increased Spell Damage per 100 Player Maximum Life

mutatedModifiers.text: Deal 5% increased Damage Over Time per 100 Player Maximum Life

lines.flavourText:
The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts,
and left a mountain of twitching dead.

lines.name: Foulborn The Brass Dome

explicitModifiers.text: Strength provides no bonus to Maximum Life
Take no Extra Damage from Critical Strikes

mutatedModifiers.text: Transcendence

lines.flavourText: The turtle's shell one day becomes its tomb.

lines.name: Foulborn Rathpith Globe
lines.variant: DOT per Life, Ailment per Life

explicitModifiers.text: Sacrifice 10% of your Life when you Use or Trigger a Spell Skill

mutatedModifiers.text: Deal 5% increased Damage Over Time per 100 Player Maximum Life
2% increased Effect of Non-Damaging Ailments you inflict with Critical Strikes per 100 Player Maximum Life

lines.flavourText:
The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts,
and left a mountain of twitching dead.

lines.name: Foulborn Dialla's Malefaction

explicitModifiers.text: Gems Socketed in Red Sockets have +2 to Level
Gems Socketed in Green Sockets have +30% to Quality

mutatedModifiers.text: +1 to Level of Socketed Gems
Ignore Attribute Requirements of Gems Socketed in Blue Sockets

lines.flavourText:
He took me by my hand, promised me power beyond compare.
But I did not do it for power.
I did it for love.
And I'd do it again in an instant.

lines.name: Olroth's Charge

explicitModifiers.text: Gain Adrenaline for 3 seconds when Ward Breaks

lines.flavourText:
Where others would retreat when vulnerable,
Olroth the Gallant fought deeper into battle.

lines.name: Foulborn Seven-League Step

mutatedModifiers.text: 15% increased Action Speed

lines.flavourText:
"Death can be outrun with these, but beware!
In running from death, you may forget to live."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 202

lines.name: Foulborn Dialla's Malefaction

explicitModifiers.text: Gems Socketed in Red Sockets have +2 to Level
Gems Socketed in Green Sockets have +30% to Quality
Gems Socketed in Blue Sockets gain 100% increased Experience

mutatedModifiers.text: +1 to Level of Socketed Gems

lines.flavourText:
He took me by my hand, promised me power beyond compare.
But I did not do it for power.
I did it for love.
And I'd do it again in an instant.

lines.name: Svalinn

explicitModifiers.text: -10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage
-10% to maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage
Trigger a Socketed Elemental Spell on Block, with a 0.25 second Cooldown

lines.flavourText:
The priests found the Great Shield the night it fell to Middengard,
but it was the smiths who delved into the secrets it held.

lines.name: Replica Alberon's Warpath

explicitModifiers.text: Adds 1 to 80 Chaos Damage to Attacks per 80 Strength

lines.flavourText:
"Starving test subject became completely incapable of exerting force.
However, after being fed, he began to poison everything he touched..."

lines.name: Foulborn Cloak of Defiance

mutatedModifiers.text: Gain (15-20)% of Maximum Mana as Extra Maximum Energy Shield

lines.flavourText:
When the throat roars,
As eyes weep,
When the hand grips hard
With trembling fingers,
When belly twists
Yet legs stand strong,
That is the work
Of the Defiant Heart.

lines.name: Foulborn The Iron Fortress

explicitModifiers.text: Chance to Block Spell Damage is Unlucky

Strength's Damage Bonus instead grants 3% increased Melee
Physical Damage per 10 Strength

mutatedModifiers.text: +1% Chance to Block Spell Damage per 50 Strength

lines.flavourText:
"Stand steadfast in the face of destruction.
The Council cannot afford to falter."
- Mauritius, the Iron Heart

lines.name: Foulborn Dialla's Malefaction

explicitModifiers.text: Gems Socketed in Red Sockets have +2 to Level
Gems Socketed in Green Sockets have +30% to Quality
Gems Socketed in Blue Sockets gain 100% increased Experience

mutatedModifiers.text: +1 to Level of Socketed Gems

lines.flavourText:
He took me by my hand, promised me power beyond compare.
But I did not do it for power.
I did it for love.
And I'd do it again in an instant.

lines.name: Foulborn Aegis Aurora

explicitModifiers.text: Recover Energy Shield equal to 2% of Armour when you Block

mutatedModifiers.text: Damage cannot be Reflected

lines.flavourText:
Born from the marriage of ice and sky,
the aurora evokes both awe and power.

lines.name: Shroud of the Lightless

explicitModifiers.text: 20% chance to Trigger Level 20 Shade Form when you Use a Socketed Skill
3% increased Maximum Life per Abyss Jewel affecting you
3% increased Maximum Mana per Abyss Jewel affecting you
Penetrate 4% Elemental Resistances per Abyss Jewel affecting you

lines.flavourText: Look to the darkness for nourishment and you will never go hungry.
